name: Nimble Musasabi
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>素</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>す</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>早</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ばや</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>いムササビ
desc: When this card is destroyed by battle and sent to the Graveyard, inflict 500 damage to your opponent. You can also Special Summon up to 2 "Nimble Musasabi" from your Deck to your opponent's side of the field in face-up Attack Position. This card cannot be Tributed for a Tribute Summon.
mnst_eff: When this card is destroyed by battle and sent to the Graveyard, inflict 500 damage to your opponent. You can also Special Summon up to 2 "Nimble Musasabi" from your Deck to your opponent's side of the field in face-up Attack Position. This card cannot be Tributed for a Tribute Summon.
